title: MoonPay Launches Platform for Banks to Access Tokenized Assets and DeFi
summary: MoonPay has introduced MoonPay Trade, a platform designed to help banks and fintechs access stablecoins, tokenized funds, and DeFi yield. This move aims to bridge traditional finance with the growing crypto market, making it easier for institutions to participate.
body:
MoonPay, a leading crypto payments firm, has expanded its services with the launch of MoonPay Trade. This new platform is specifically designed for banks and fintech companies, providing them with a one-stop shop to access stablecoins, tokenized funds, and decentralized finance (DeFi) yield. By offering this infrastructure, MoonPay aims to make it easier for traditional financial institutions to enter the crypto market.

The platform will allow banks and fintechs to manage and trade tokenized assets seamlessly. MoonPay Trade will support a range of stablecoins, which are cryptocurrencies pegged to the value of traditional assets like the US dollar, as well as tokenized funds that represent ownership in traditional financial instruments. Additionally, the platform will provide access to DeFi yield, enabling institutions to earn returns on their crypto holdings through lending, staking, and other DeFi protocols.

This expansion is significant for everyday people because it could lead to more traditional financial products being offered with crypto-backed options. For example, banks might start offering savings accounts or investment funds that utilize stablecoins or tokenized assets, providing consumers with new ways to manage their money. This could also increase the adoption of crypto in everyday financial transactions, making it more accessible to a broader audience.

MoonPay Trade is expected to roll out in phases, with initial partnerships already in the works. Banks and fintechs interested in leveraging this platform should keep an eye on MoonPay's announcements for more details on availability and integration. As the platform gains traction, it could become a key player in bridging the gap between traditional finance and the crypto market, offering new opportunities for both institutions and individual users.
twitterThread: MoonPay just launched a platform for banks to access tokenized assets and DeFi yield. This could mean more crypto-backed financial products for everyday users.
MoonPay Trade offers stablecoins, tokenized funds, and DeFi yield in one place. Banks and fintechs can now easily tap into the crypto market.

If your bank starts offering crypto-backed savings or investment options, MoonPay Trade might be behind it. Watch for more integrations → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-21-moonpay-launches-platform-for-banks-to-access-tokenized-assets-and-defi
standaloneTweet: MoonPay's new platform lets banks offer crypto-backed savings and investment options. This could mean more stablecoin and tokenized asset products for everyday users.
